given: the validation query has been created and the DBA needs to review migration integrity before dropping inventory_code
when: a database administrator executes the validation query
then: they can retrieve the count of unparseable codes and review it for acceptance
architectural_notes: Infra: a contract on the data-store, the probe count is retrievable and reviewable on the paired branch so the DBA can accept the migration before inventory_code is dropped. Owner: the validation/probe statement in the repository/migration layer (app/repositories), exposed as a reviewable result, not a UI flow. Cross-cutting concern: schema-evolution governance / data integrity (R1), the review gate that precedes the destructive drop, owned at the repository/migration layer.

independence.rationale: AC3 tests the accuracy of the count for unparseable codes; AC4 tests that the count is accessible and reviewable by DBAs
